challengeTask: Use 'Let' in at least 15 real sentences today — at least 5 'Let me', 4 'Let him/her/them', 3 'Don't let', and 3 'Let us' — in real conversations, at home, or in a journal entry.
hindiTask: आज 'Let' का उपयोग कम से कम 15 असली वाक्यों में करें — कम से कम 5 'Let me', 4 'Let him/her/them', 3 'Don't let', और 3 'Let us' — असली बातचीत में, घर पर, या diary में।
successCriteria: All 15 sentences are grammatically correct (correct object pronoun, base verb, no 'to')
'Let' formula applied correctly in every sentence
At least one sentence uses 'Don't let' with a real context
At least one sentence uses the question form (Will you let me...?)
No spelling mistakes in written sentences
bonusChallenge: Record a 60-second audio of yourself using 5 'Let me' sentences in a self-introduction or a work scenario. Review and correct your own pronunciation.
